user.title: Core Monitoring
user.description: Step 1 of 3. Choose which device domains to monitor and define the offline escalation thresholds.

data_description.tracked_domains: Keep real device domains such as lights, switches, and covers first. On large systems, avoid enabling every sensor-like domain on the first run.
data_description.warning_threshold: A device becomes warning after being offline for at least this many seconds.
data_description.critical_threshold: A device becomes critical after being offline for at least this many seconds. Must be greater than or equal to the warning threshold.
data_description.treat_unknown_as_offline: When enabled, unknown is treated as offline. Disabled by default to reduce false positives.

exclusions.title: Exclusions
exclusions.description: Step 2 of 3. Exclude domains, integrations, devices, or entities that should not participate in monitoring.

data_description.exclude_domains: Exclude an entire entity domain, for example if no sensor entities should participate.
data_description.exclude_integrations: Exclude a whole integration, such as mqtt, zha, or esphome.
data_description.exclude_devices: Exclude by device. The whole selected device will be ignored by offline monitoring.
data_description.exclude_entities: Exclude specific entities only. Useful for noisy or unstable auxiliary entities.

advanced.title: Advanced Settings
advanced.description: Step 3 of 3. These options only affect UI refresh behavior, battery thresholds, and recovered metadata retention. They do not poll devices.

data.treat_battery_unavailable_unknown_as_low: Treat unavailable or unknown battery as low

data_description.ui_refresh_interval: Used only to refresh offline duration and severity display, in seconds.
data_description.cleanup_orphan_after_hours: How many hours to retain recovered metadata for devices that no longer exist in the registry.
data_description.low_battery_threshold: Devices with battery levels below this percentage are added to the low battery list.
data_description.treat_battery_unavailable_unknown_as_low: When enabled, battery entities that are unavailable or unknown are treated as 0% and counted as low battery. Disable it to filter them out.

error.threshold_order: The critical threshold must be greater than or equal to the warning threshold.
error.no_domains: At least one tracked domain must be selected.

abort.already_configured: This integration has already been configured.

init.title: Core Monitoring
init.description: Step 1 of 3. Update the monitored domains and the offline detection rules.

data_description.tracked_domains: This controls which entity domains participate in device offline monitoring. The more you enable, the heavier the first scan becomes.
data_description.warning_threshold: A device becomes warning after being offline for at least this many seconds.
data_description.critical_threshold: A device becomes critical after being offline for at least this many seconds. Must be greater than or equal to the warning threshold.
data_description.treat_unknown_as_offline: When enabled, unknown is treated as offline. Disabled by default to reduce false positives.

exclusions.title: Exclusions
exclusions.description: Step 2 of 3. Exclude domains, integrations, devices, or entities that should not participate in monitoring.

data_description.exclude_domains: Exclude an entire entity domain, for example if no sensor entities should participate.
data_description.exclude_integrations: Exclude a whole integration, such as mqtt, zha, or esphome.
data_description.exclude_devices: Exclude by device. The whole selected device will be ignored by offline monitoring.
data_description.exclude_entities: Exclude specific entities only. Useful for noisy or unstable auxiliary entities.

advanced.title: Advanced Settings
advanced.description: Step 3 of 3. These options only affect display refresh behavior, battery thresholds, and recovered metadata retention. They do not poll devices.

data.treat_battery_unavailable_unknown_as_low: Treat unavailable or unknown battery as low

data_description.ui_refresh_interval: Used only to refresh offline duration and severity display, in seconds.
data_description.cleanup_orphan_after_hours: How many hours to retain recovered metadata for devices that no longer exist in the registry.
data_description.low_battery_threshold: Devices with battery levels below this percentage are added to the low battery list.
data_description.treat_battery_unavailable_unknown_as_low: When enabled, battery entities that are unavailable or unknown are treated as 0% and counted as low battery. Disable it to filter them out.

error.threshold_order: The critical threshold must be greater than or equal to the warning threshold.
error.no_domains: At least one tracked domain must be selected.

reset_stats.name: Reset statistics
reset_stats.description: Rebuild indexes and recalculate offline and low battery records from the current Home Assistant state.
